common.enterEmailError: Da fatan za a shigar da adireshin imel naka

login.title: Tashar Mai Wasa
login.subtitle: Shiga don ganin gasannin ka, makinka, da matsayin gasar
login.forgotPassword: Ka manta da kalmar sirrin ka?
login.appleIdentityTokenError: Apple bai dawo da alamar gane mutum ba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
login.enterEmailAndPassword: Da fatan za a shigar da imel da kalmar sirri

register.title: Ƙirƙiri Asusun Mai Wasa
register.subtitle: Yi rajista don bin diddigin makinka da shiga gasar
register.activateAccountInstructions: Danna hanyar a cikin imel don kunna asusunka, sannan shiga a nan.
register.verificationEmailFailedFallback: An ƙirƙiri asusunka, amma ba mu iya aika imel din tabbatarwa yanzu ba. Shiga kuma yi amfani da "Sake aika imel din tabbatarwa" don samun sabon hanya.
register.passwordMin8: Kalmar sirri ya kamata ta zama aƙalla haruffa 8
register.passwordsDoNotMatch: Kalmomin sirri ba su yi daidai ba

forgotPassword.title: Sake Saita Kalmar Sirri
forgotPassword.subtitle: Za mu aika hanyar sake saitawa zuwa adireshin imel din ka mai rijista
forgotPassword.sentBodySuffix: , mun aika hanyar sake saita kalmar sirri. Ya ƙare a cikin sa'a 1.

resendVerification.title: Sake Aika Tabbatarwa
resendVerification.subtitle: Shigar da adireshin imel naka, kuma za mu aika sabuwar hanyar tabbatarwa.
resendVerification.sentBody: An aika sabuwar hanyar tabbatarwa zuwa {{email}}. Duba akwatin saƙon naka.
resendVerification.failedToResendVerification: Sake aika imel din tabbatarwa ya gaza
